column14: statement: SELECT e.gender, AVG(s.benefits_score) AS average_benefits_score FROM hr_survey.satisfaction_survey AS s JOIN employees.employee e ON s.employee_email = e.email GROUP BY e.gender;

statement: SELECT e.gender, AVG(s.amount) AS average_salary
FROM employees.employee AS e
JOIN employees.salary s ON e.id = s.employee_id
GROUP BY e.gender;

statement: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM e.birth_date) as year, AVG(ss.support_score) FROM employees.employee AS e JOIN hr_survey.satisfaction_survey AS ss ON e.email = ss.employee_email GROUP BY year ORDER BY YEAR
